_comment: Copy this file to start a new experiment. Fill in all fields.

experiment.name: experiment-name
experiment.hypothesis: Describe what you expect to happen and why.

variables.independent: What you are changing (e.g. model, profile, ensemble config)
variables.dependent: What you are measuring (e.g. task completion, deaths, response latency)
variables.controlled: What stays the same (e.g. Minecraft world seed, settings, difficulty)
